name: opencode-memoir
description: Memoir memory plugin for OpenCode — Git-versioned, taxonomy-structured AI memory.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.json --declaration --emitDeclarationOnly && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.js --external:node:* --external:@opencode-ai/plugin --external:@opencode-ai/sdk --external:@modelcontextprotocol/sdk --sourcemap && mkdir -p dist/prompts && cp src/prompts/*.tmpl dist/prompts/
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm test && node -e "import('./dist/index.js').then(m=>{const d=m.default;if(!d||typeof d!=='object'||typeof d.server!=='function'||d.id!=='opencode-memoir'){console.error('Smoke FAILED: default export is not a V1 plugin module ({ id, server })');process.exit(1)}else{console.log('Smoke OK: id=',d.id,'server=',typeof d.server)}})"

author: Dmitrii Safronov <dhameoelin@gmail.com>
